mods.description: ''Many tweaks to Vanilla Blocks''
Adds various food-related HUD improvements
Unlock the full potential of armor stands! Works on vanilla servers, too.
''Make loggers asynchronous for higher logging throughput and better performance''
Crossplatform Baked Model Loader
''Abstraction Layer (but not really) for Blay's multiplatform mods''
A complete redesign of Minecraft's desert temples!
A complete redesign of Minecraft's dungeons!
A complete redesign of the End island, making the Ender Dragon fight much more fun and interesting!
A complete redesign of Minecraft's Nether Fortresses!
The long-awaited and much-needed abandoned mineshaft overhaul!
A complete redesign of Minecraft's ocean monuments!
A complete redesign of Minecraft's strongholds!
Adds new and improved witch huts to swamps!
Bookshelf is a library mod that provides code, frameworks, and utilities for other mods. Many mods make use of Bookshelf and are powered by its code.
''A NeoForge mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft.''

mods.description: Advancements optimization mod, updated fork of Icterine with added features
Every block needs a friend!
Pre-generates chunks, quickly, efficiently, and safely
'''Collective is a shared library with common code for all of Serilum's mods.
Protect your pets.
''Connect your fences with a decorative chain!''
''All the copycats you've ever wanted, combined into a single mod!''
''Technology that empowers the player.''
''Integrated cooking automation for Create''
''Quality-of-life blocks that you wish existed in Create.''
''Library mod for DragonsPlusMinecraft Create-addons.''
''Enchantment, Experience, Enhancement and Enlightening - with Create''
''Mechanical chunk loaders for Create.''
An addon for the Create mod developed to increase automation possibilities, adding 30 (reasonably) balanced recipes to the game.
''Encase Your World !''
''Diesel Generators, Oil processing.''
''Add glass casing and illuminate casing''
''Adds a Shuffle Filter item to that can be used in Create mods, deployers on contraptions to randomly output one of the filter matching items in its inventory.''
''A flexible and expandable accessory/equipment API for users and developers.''
Cleanly swing through transparent blocks like tall grass to hit mobs without breaking said block.
''A Minecraft mod featuring new blocks, items, armor, and hidden mysteries to complement the Deep Dark.''
Golden armor trims distract piglins from attacking you.
''A mod of Qol decor''
''A mod of Qol''
Be ready for overhauled anvils! Items stay, better name tags, many tweaks!
'''Bored to switch between crafting and §6Create§r's clipboard?
''Plugin for EMI that shows chest loot, block drops, mob drops, and gameplay loot like fishing.''
Adds descriptions of enchantment effects to their descriptions.
''An addon mod for Farmer's Delight based around adding culinary content to the End!''
''extended customization for Create mod wrenches''
EMI addon adding support for as many mods as possible
Core API module providing key hooks and intercompatibility features.
A cozy farming and cooking expansion for Minecraft!
''Introduces multithreading to the json recipe system.''
Dependency target for other mods
''A Storage System for Create by FoxyNoTail''
A subtle-ish overhaul of vanilla Overworld biomes.
A mod loader for Groovy mods
''Fixes VRAM leaks. Based on VideoTape, improved by Mr.Toad.''
Shared library mod required by most of iChun's Mods.
''Forces villages to only spawn on flat terrain.''
A nether biome overhaul combined with challenging structures to conquer, unique weapons to obtain, and tricky mobs to defeat.
Minecraft mod shows what you are looking at. (Hwyla fork)
Jade additional mod supports
''Faster texture animation''
Minecraft modding library
The most feature-complete dynamic lighting mod.
Shared code for my mod.
A library mod with new configurability and compatibility enhancements for worldgen
''A library containing various utilities.''
Generates unique loot for each player that opens a loot container.
''A cozy cavern focused cooking expansion for Farmer's Delight!''
''A small library with many cool unique features, from dynamic asset generation to dynamic villager schedules, data driven trades and Map Markers, simple multi loader utilities and more''
A library mod which provides various utilities for IMB11's mods.
An new Nether expansion for Farmer's Delight!!
''Enhances the overworld by adding new wildlife with unique behavior!''
Optimization tool that removes Minecraft's recipe book
''Ensures correct destinations when travelling back and forth through Nether Portals in Multiplayer.''
Bountiful addon that change many trades to use Numismatic Overhaul coins
Collection of shared code for OctoStudios' mods
''1 (one) library boi''
Cross-Platform library mod based on Architectury to access both Forge and Fabric APIs
''Allows potions to stack up to 16''
Bringing Prickle, the JSON based configuration file format to Minecraft.
Why it's called Puzzles, you ask? That's the puzzle!
''Small things, improving Minecraft bit by bit.''
Improve datapack / resourcepack zip file loading times
'''Unofficial port of Create: Steam 'n' Rails to 1.21.1.
A stack of new biomes spread across the Overworld and Nether!
''Integrating Chipped into vanilla biomes and structures.''
A library for creating config files for your mod across multiple platforms.
Team Resourceful Library
''A Minecraft modding library for better projectiles.''
''Interactive moving block structures with physics.''
Book improvements: two-page view, easy formatting, lectern editing, colored books, reading animation, QOL-features and more.
''Making automation for Farmers Delight more sensible''
''Optimizes BlockEntity render bounds for create mod''
''Makes Farmer Villagers smarter!''
''Provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks.''
''An attempt at optimizing jigsaw generation''
''Many functional and useful Vanilla+ blocks''
''Spice up your world with new villages, pillager outposts, and even new ships!''
A library mod for adding biomes in a simple and compatible manner with Minecraft's new biome/terrain system.
''Adds a trash slot to the inventory screen that allows deletion of unwanted items.''
Makes trees more choppable.
Yet Another Library Mod
Backporting Minecraft Features to previous versions!
''Adds train map to xaero's world map just like in journey map''
API Library for YUNG's minecraft mods.
Adds naturally occurring bridges throughout the world!
Extra structures and vanilla+ content added throughout the game!
A fully featured Library designed around loading highly configurable, agile developed. modular mods

crash_summaries.display_label: java.lang.Error: ServerHangWatchdog detected that a single server tick took 60000004.00 seconds (should be max 0.05)
crash_summaries.exception: java.lang.Error: ServerHangWatchdog detected that a single server tick took 60000004.00 seconds (should be max 0.05)
crash_summaries.plain_english: The main server thread stopped responding for ~60s (tick watchdog). Usually lag from world gen, pregen, or a heavy contraption — not necessarily a broken mod.
fix_hints: Check for heavy world gen, Chunky/DH pregen, or laggy contraptions before the hang.
Review Spark or a tick profiler; reduce simulation distance if MSPT was high.
If this repeats with no players online, look for chunk loaders or rogue entities.

mod_recommendations.why: Some mods reference Minecraft client code; NeoForge blocks it on a dedicated server and logs ERROR.
mod_recommendations.fix: Usually safe if TPS is healthy and there are no related crashes. Remove client-only mods from server mods/ to reduce noise, or update mods if crashes occur.
mod_recommendations.install_hint: Remove client-only mods from server mods/ (see CLIENT-ONLY MODS ON SERVER) or update mods.
mod_recommendations.should_worry: Usually safe if TPS is healthy and there are no related crashes. Remove client-only mods from server mods/ to reduce noise, or update mods if crashes occur.

[19Jun2026 21:38:10.413] [main/ERROR] [net.neoforged.fml.loading.moddiscovery.ModFile/LOADING]: Access transformer file META-INF/accesstransformer.cfg provided by mod pride does not exist!
[19Jun2026 16:07:06.050] [main/ERROR] [net.neoforged.fml.loading.moddiscovery.ModFile/LOADING]: Access transformer file META-INF/accesstransformer.cfg provided by mod pride does not exist!
mod_recommendations.why: Mod jar for pride appears corrupt or incomplete on disk.
mod_recommendations.fix: pride may be a bad download — confirm by removing it and testing startup.
fix_steps: Remove pride (pride.jar) from your server mods/ folder.
Start the server and wait for "Done!" — if it boots, that mod was blocking startup.
Re-download pride from the official source (Modrinth/CurseForge) and put the jar back in mods/.
Start again — if it fails the same way, leave the mod out or try a different version; you have confirmed the culprit.
mod_recommendations.explanation: Mod jar for pride appears corrupt or incomplete on disk.
mod_recommendations.should_worry: Broken jar can cause load failures or subtle bugs — reinstall recommended.
mod_recommendations.action_detail: Confirm pride is the problem by removing it, testing startup, then reinstalling if needed.

mod_recommendations.why: Client-oriented mods detected on the dedicated server.
mod_recommendations.fix: Consider removing listed client-only mods from server mods/ (see CLIENT-ONLY MODS ON SERVER).
mod_recommendations.install_hint: Remove one mod at a time and restart to verify.

mod_recommendations.why: Some mods could not be classified confidently as client-only.
mod_recommendations.fix: Test removing uncertain mods one at a time from server mods/ before deleting from the pack.
